tool.name: Khoj
tool.description: Self-hosted AI personal assistant with persistent memory, web search, and document RAG. Chat via web, Obsidian, or Emacs.

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.25
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Give Khoj Long Term Memories by @sabaimran in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1168
* Improve Obsidian Batch Sync. Show Progress, Storage Used on Settings Page by @hjamet in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1221
* Show autocomplete suggestions for File Query Filters on Obsidian App by @samhoooo in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1128
* Add ability to copy references from Web App by @kowshik24 in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1144
* Fix AttributeError when Eleven Labs API key is not set by @majiayu000 in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1238

## New Contributors
* @kowshik24 made their first contribution in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1144
* @majiayu000 made their first contribution in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1238

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.24...2.0.0-beta.25

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.24
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
- Render mermaid diagram wrapped in markdown codeblocks on web app

## 🛠️ Fix
- Fix subscriptions failures
- Fix AI interacting with user files in code sandbox 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.23...2.0.0-beta.24

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.23
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
* Enable excluding folders to sync from obsidian plugin settings by @borismus in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1235
* Make Nano Banana Pro output 2K resolution images] by @debanjum in c5650f1
* Enable parallel tool calling for faster research in 054ed79
* Unify login via single login popup experience in 5e65754a8bfb3b8d5929c3cf4490d872b2c1fc39
* Show Khoj product landing page on app open to unauthenticated users in 9801ffd

## New Contributors
* @borismus made their first contribution in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1235

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.22...2.0.0-beta.23

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.22
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
- Lower cost of using Anthropic models by improving context caching by @debanjum in 181332dcb
- Enable reasoning with Claude Haiku 4.5 in 4654ac496

## 🛠️ Fix
- Improve stability of chat response with 9c03af273, f1337c3b0, bdf9afa72

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.21...2.0.0-beta.22

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.21
releases.body:
## 🛠️ Fix
- Fix extracting image by URL in chat history when using Nano Banana Pro in e2340c709

## 🍃 Deprecate
- Drop support for generating images over Stability AI API

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.20...2.0.0-beta.21

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.20
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
- Support precise Image Editing with Gemini [Nano Banana](https://blog.google/technology/ai/nano-banana-pro/) in da493be41

## 🧪 Improve
- Get faster response by defaulting to Fast Model as Tool AI in 99f16df7e
- Configure Fallback Models to use by adding multiple Server Chat Settings with configurable priority from Admin Panel in 731700ac4

## 🛠️ Fix
- Do not try render invalid image paths in message on web app in dd4381c25
- Do not crop non-square images generated by Khoj on web app in 51b893d51

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.19...2.0.0-beta.20

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.19
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
- Add Support for [Gemini Pro 3](https://blog.google/products/gemini/gemini-3/)
- Add Support for [Minimax M2](https://www.minimax.io/news/minimax-m2)

## 🛠️ Fix
- Fix issue with new Agent safety checker
- Test khoj.el with newer Emacs versions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.18...2.0.0-beta.19

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.18
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
- Support Exa as fast webpage reader
- Support using MCP tools in research mode by @debanjum in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1229

## 🧪 Improve
- Show agent creation validation error in UX
- Improve new agent safety checker
- Upgrade to Firecrawl v2 web search, webpage read providers

## 🛠️ Fix
- Drop support for Firecrawl webpage summarizer

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.17...2.0.0-beta.18

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.17
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
- Add support for Exa as web search provider

## 🧪 Improve
- Improve cost, usage tracking for Grok 4, Claude 4.5, Kimi K2 Thinking models

## 🛠️ Fix
- Drop support for Jina for web search, webpage read
- Remove deprecated /default slash command from UX slash command options

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.16...2.0.0-beta.17

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.16
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
- Evaluate Khoj on the same set of questions across modes in a single eval run
- Upgrade server, web and desktop package dependencies

## 🛠️ Fix
- Handle regression in using AI models via Groq API for research mode by @debanjum in 2fdb1fc

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.15...2.0.0-beta.16

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.15
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
* Create images with different aspect ratios (i.e portrait, landscape, square) via user instructions by @debanjum in 1e81b51abc1202785a19efd5f3772cecb5228acf
* Support Cerebras AI model API in dd8e805cfe128067371f580841b159597d761cc5
* Allow Server Admins to set Chat Models for Fast vs Deep thinking in 4976b244a4824d049bc33c13c8dd1438f3dd3102

## 🛠️ Fix
* Fix indexing Notion knowledge bases in 00f0d23224e2115bca12560e7ba82f5754669d78
* Only show tools that have been already configured to agents

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.14...2.0.0-beta.15

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.14
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
- Improve Khoj research tools and Openai api usage in 9f6aa922a
- Improve table, train of thought rendering, show disconnect errors on web app in b99ccbc4c, 13d26ae8b and 59bfaf969
- Improve Gpt-oss, Deepseek V3.1 model support in 9f6aa922a, 464c1546b
- Fallback to Groq Flex Service Tier for higher rate limits in 29ae476a2

## 🛠️ Fix
* Fix to create chat with custom agents from Obsidian by @Fh26697 in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1216
* Fix and improve file read, write handling in Obsidian by @debanjum in 3c3205bb0

## New Contributors
* @Fh26697 made their first contribution in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1216

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.13...2.0.0-beta.14

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.13
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
* Add support for GPT 5 model series by @debanjum in 564adb24a

## 🧪 Improve
* **[Breaking Change]** Drop **native offline chat** and server file indexing in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1212
* Improve researcher agent and its tools in 0e1615acc, a79025ee9, 0a6d87067, cbeefb7f9
* Improve cache and reasoning utilization for official openai model in b2d26088d


## ⚙️ Developer
* Speed up app development using a faster, modern toolchain in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1196


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.12...2.0.0-beta.13

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.12
releases.body:
## 🎁 New
- Add support for Grok 4

## 🧪 Improve
- Improve extracting thoughts from reasoning models
- Improve web, semantic search tool context shown to research agent

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.11...2.0.0-beta.12

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.9
releases.body:
## 🧪 Improve
* Ease bi-directional messaging on web app using websockets by @debanjum in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1207
  This should make it easier and faster to guide Khoj while it is doing research by sending messages from the chat page on web app

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.8...2.0.0-beta.9

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.2
releases.body:
## 🛠️ Fix
- Fix saving conversations with document references for documents indexed before previous 2.0.0-beta.1 release
  Fallback to set URI to file based URI when document line number based deeplink URI is unset by @debanjum in 4c33d1a52

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/2.0.0-beta.1...2.0.0-beta.2

releases.name: 2.0.0-beta.1
releases.body:
🎉 This is the first pre-release of the Khoj 2.x series! Khoj is being re-architected to do **much** more substantial tasks for you. See the [Khoj 2.0 live coding sessions](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDrFCOjUmUphfPu9SgJ54eBYnoN-xYzgJ) for more details.

This release upgrades Khoj's document retrieval capabilities. Try it out and let us know on Github, Discord how it feels! 

## 🧪 Improve
* Get much more comprehensive answers from your documents in research mode by @debanjum in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1205
* Add deeplinks to Improve context for document retrieval in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1206

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/1.42.8...2.0.0-beta.1

This is a maintenance release for the 1.x series.

## 🧪 Improve
- Retry calls to Gemini API on on Stream Read Error in 0d4c40581
- Bump free tier upload limits to 50Mb in 307e40c37

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/1.42.8...1.42.9

## 🧪 Improve
- Sync large knowledge bases with agents atomically in 9774bb012
- Show friendly name for available ai models on clients in a8c47a70f

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/1.42.7...1.42.8

## 🧪 Improve
* Improve support for new Deepseek R1 model (0528) in 29e5d7ef0
* Ease bulk (de-)selecting of files to add/remove to agent knowledge base in 1566e3c74
* Improve image generation success in ca9109455, 4448ab665

## 🛠️ Fix
* **Fix semantic search to improve quality of document retrieval** in 170a8036f.
* Allow setting embedded postgres db directory via env var by @petergaultney in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1202

## New Contributors
* @petergaultney made their first contribution in https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/pull/1202

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/1.42.6...1.42.7
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj/compare/1.42.5...1.42.6
